query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_pagos,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN p.projectId IS NULL THEN 1 END) as pagos_sin_proyecto,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN p.projectId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as pagos_con_proyecto,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN pr.id IS NULL THEN 1 END) as pagos_proyecto_inexistente
FROM payments p
LEFT JOIN projects pr ON p.projectId = pr.id

  COUNT(CASE WHEN p.projectId IS NULL THEN 1 END) as pagos_sin_proyecto,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN p.projectId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as pagos_con_proyecto,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN pr.id IS NULL THEN 1 END) as pagos_proyecto_inexistente
FROM payments p
LEFT JOIN projects pr ON p.projectId = pr.id
